comment: 51yo female with refractory celiac disease type 2 (persistent villous atrophy despite strict gluten-free diet for 4 years + aberrant intraepithelial lymphocyte clonality). No current EATL. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = strict gluten-free diet adherence + periodic small-bowel imaging (MR enterography or VCE) q1-2y + immunosuppression discussion for refractory type 2; alternative = gluten-free diet alone. Validates v0.3 celiac refractory → EATL prevention pilot. Refractory type 2 carries very high EATL risk.
